name: Chiffonade of Lobster (Kvnh17b)
recipeIngredient: 1 dash Salt and pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop or shred the cooked lobster meat and refrigerate until the dressing has been prepared.
2. For the dressing, place the egg yolk in a mixing bowl and add vinegar, mustard, tomato paste, salt, and pepper with cayenne.
3. Gradually add the salad oil, beating vigorously with a wire whisk.
4. Add lemon juice to the mixture.
5. Beat in the lemon juice, tarragon, and cognac.
6. Add lobster and tomatoes to the dressing and fold gently with a rubber spatula.
7. This can be done in advance and refrigerated for an hour or so.
8. Prepare the salad: When ready to serve, stack crisped romaine lettuce leaves and slice them into fine shreds. Place the shreds on individual salad plates.
9. Top with lobster dressing and serve immediately. (You may substitute crabmeat or shrimp for the lobster.) A Craig Claiborne recipe.
